allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Token found:', bool\(d.get\('token',''\)\)\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('generated_at:', d.get\('generated_at'\)\); print\('generated_date:', d.get\('generated_date'\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('TOP LEVEL KEYS:', list\(d.keys\(\)\)\); print\('news count:', len\(d.get\('news',[]\)\)\);  print\('risks count:', len\(d.get\('risks',[]\)\)\);  print\('macro count:', len\(d.get\('macro',[]\)\)\);  print\('strengths count:', len\(d.get\('strengths',[]\)\)\);  print\('concerns count:', len\(d.get\('concerns',[]\)\)\);  print\('stocks key:', 'stocks' in d\); print\('other keys:', [k for k in d.keys\(\) if k not in ['macro','risks','news','strengths','concerns']]\)")
